mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user
AND is_deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT id, username, password, real_name, phone, email, department_id, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password, real_name, phone, email, department_id, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, department_id = #{departmentId} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, u.email, u.department_id, d.dept_name, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN department d ON u.department_id = d.id AND d.is_deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password, real_name, phone, email, department_id, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password, real_name, phone, email, department_id, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
